basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate, Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI)
basic_details.post_name: Project Associate - I, Project Assistant - II

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years (Relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women is 5 years, OBC is 3 years)
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates and 03 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Life Sciences (Zoology/Biotechnology/Botany)/Food Science and Technology or B.Sc./Science graduate.
qualification.details: Project Associate - I: M.Sc. in Life Sciences (Zoology/Biotechnology/Botany)/Food Science and Technology from a recognized University. Project Assistant - II: B.Sc./Science graduate.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA for NET/GATE qualified candidates, Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA for others for Project Associate - I; Rs. 20,000/- plus HRA for Project Assistant - II.
salary_details.details: Project Associate - I: Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA for candidates who have qualified National Eligibility Tests (CSIR-UGC NET, GATE etc.), or Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA for others. Project Assistant - II: Rs. 20,000/- plus HRA.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR CFTRI Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CFTRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CSIR CFTRI recruitment is 21st June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CSIR CFTRI recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Project Associate - I and Project Assistant - II in the CSIR CFTRI recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate - I post, candidates must have an M.Sc. degree in Life Sciences (Zoology/Biotechnology/Botany) or Food Science and Technology from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the CSIR CFTRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: Project Associate - I will receive a salary of Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA if they have qualified NET/GATE, and Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA for others.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this CSIR CFTRI recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the CSIR CFTRI posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates by a designated committee, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for CSIR CFTRI recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online only through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR CFTRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CFTRI is located in Mysuru, Karnataka, with the pincode 570020.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment, meaning the positions are temporary and contractual, likely for a specific research project.
